summary: DHH teases the upcoming launch of Writeboard, a project from 37signals that had been delayed twice by the releases of Ta-da List and Backpack. He acknowledges it's not a massive product but calls it their most polished work yet. The post builds anticipation by promising a public release the following week while keeping details minimal.
key_points: Writeboard was repeatedly delayed as other 37signals products (Ta-da List, Backpack) shipped first
DHH emphasizes polish and simple usefulness over size or feature count
The teaser format reflects 37signals' approach of building anticipation through transparency
money_quotes: No, it's not a huge thing. But quite possibly the most polished one we've done so far.
key_insight: A product doesn't need to be big to be valuable — polish and simple usefulness matter more.
